ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Main website of the company */,
  "primary_contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person for the company */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the company record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone1" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the contact */,
  "phone2" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the contact */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact's primary location */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact or company the website belongs to */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the website (e.g., corporate, personal) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the website record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the website record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_functions" (
  "job_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job function */,
  "job_function_name" TEXT /* Name of the job function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job function */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the job function record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the job function record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_job_functions" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "job_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job function */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job function */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job function (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id", "job_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the location record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_access_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)
